scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:logistics-data" "npm run dev:recommendations" "sleep 2 && npm run dev:logistics" --names ui,mcp,recommendations,logistics --prefix-colors blue,yellow,magenta,green --kill-others
scripts.dev:logistics-data: cd ../backend/logistics-data && uv run python -m uvicorn main:rest_app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --reload
scripts.dev:recommendations: cd ../backend/recommendations && uv run python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5002 --reload
scripts.dev:logistics: cd ../backend/logistics && uv run python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "npm run dev:logistics-data" "npm run dev:recommendations" "sleep 2 && npm run dev:logistics" --names mcp,recommendations,logistics --prefix-colors yellow,magenta,green --kill-others
